name: Minature French Breakfast Puffs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease the bottoms of 48 small muffin cups.
3. Mix together the shortening, 1/2 cup sugar, and egg in a bowl until well combined.
4. In a separate bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, salt, and nutmeg.
5. Alternately stir the flour mixture and milk into the shortening/sugar mixture.
6. Fill each greased muffin cup about 2/3 full with the batter.
7. Bake for 15 minutes or until the puffs are golden brown.
8. Immediately dip each puff in melted butter, then coat with a mixture of cinnamon and sugar.
9. Serve hot. Makes 3-1/2 to 4 dozen.
